positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic Bengal tiger coiled amongst jungle flora. The style should be a fusion of modern graphic design and vintage woodcut illustration, featuring thick, crisp outlines and dramatic cross-hatching textures. The color palette is highly contrasting: deep emerald greens, earthy ochres, and vibrant burnt orange for the tiger, set against a muted beige or charcoal background. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for a repeating or single-placement apparel print. Focus on strong silhouette definition and negative space. Include subtle, decorative floral elements framing the main subject. Studio lighting, flat lay perspective, highly detailed line art, vector illustration aesthetic.
negative: photo, realistic, blurry, grainy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, monochrome
